{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Beast God Skull Sculpture
|class_id=20297
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=Upon learning of the fall of the Beast God, Earth's Will commissioned the creation of a series of statues based on its skull's design. These sculptures serve two purposes: to commemorate the historic moment of overcoming formidable enemies and to be gifted to extraordinary time travelers, allowing them to share the joy of this victory together!
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=34
|civ=14
|tech=12
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +50<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +100<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail ATK +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
}}
